commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 1 Chronicles 11:31 Ithai the son of Ribai of Gibeah, that belonged to the children of Benjamin, Benaiah the Pirathonite, Ethai. Not the famous prince of Geth, (2 Kings xv. ; Kennicott) though the name is written alike, (2 Kings xxiii. ) an i being omitted. (Haydock) This captain contributed to make David king, ver. 2 Kings xxiii. , a v is added, which makes the name like that of the second general; (ver. ) but it ought to form part of the e, which is wanting in the following word.
